name: spotify-top-tracks
description: Get the user's most-played Spotify tracks. Returns track names, artists, albums, and popularity. Use for questions like 'what songs have I been listening to?', 'what are my top tracks this month?', 'what music am I into lately?', 'show my most played songs'. time_range: short_term=4 weeks, medium_term=6 months, long_term=all time.

input.description: time_range controls the window: short_term (4 weeks), medium_term (6 months, default), long_term (all time). limit is 1-50 (default: 20).

time_range.description: short_term (4 weeks), medium_term (6 months, default), long_term (all time)

output.description: items array of track objects, each with name, artists (array), album name, duration_ms, popularity (0-100), and Spotify ID.
